# RIBALI

> Greek atelier of handcrafted rigid inflatable boats (RIBs). Editorial performance craft built by hand in Piraeus since 1998 — Deep-V hulls, ORCA Hypalon tubes, sold through an authorised dealer network across the Mediterranean.

RIBALI designs and hand-builds three RIB hulls (R-520, R-680, R-950) in its Piraeus, Greece workshop. Each boat is laid, finished, and sea-trialled by hand. Sea trials and service are available through authorised dealers in Greece, Italy, France, Spain, Croatia, and the UAE.

## Pages

- [Home](/): RIBALI brand, philosophy, and featured models.
- [About](/about): The Piraeus atelier — story, craft, values, people.
- [Collection](/models): The three RIBALI hulls compared — R-520, R-680, R-950.
- [R-520 Explore](/models/r-520): Compact 5.2m RIB, handcrafted for coves and tender duty.
- [R-680 Sport](/models/r-680): 6.8m Deep-V RIB with ORCA Hypalon tubes — the everyday performer.
- [R-950 Cruise](/models/r-950): 9.5m flagship stepped Deep-V RIB with forward cabin.
- [Configurator](/configurator): Live 3D configurator — hull, tubes, canopy, engine, extras.
- [Dealers](/dealers): Authorised RIBALI partners across the Mediterranean.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a sea trial, request a quote, or visit the Piraeus shipyard.
